title: Zappi Co 100% Recycled Plush Elephant Plush Toy (13-15cm) Stuffed Soft Cuddly animals Collection For New Born Child Tiktok featured
features: MADE FOR HUGS: This 100% Recycled Elephant plush toy is great for cuddles! Soft and cozy, it makes a cuddly best friend for your child and can also be used for pretend play to bring their active imagination to life. Treat the little one to hours of fun, and cute, cuddly moments they’ll cherish. Measures (13-15cm) tall Head to tail.

FULLY RECYCLED: At Zappi Co, we're committed to reducing plastic waste and have replaced plastic beans with 100% recycled fill to create a plush Red Panda friend filled with love. By choosing our recycled plush toy, you're not only giving your child a companion to cherish, but you're also helping to reduce plastic pollution in our environment.

QUALITY: We’ve designed this animal plush toy to last through all those tight hugs and enthusiastic play. The toy can be easily washed at 40 degrees if any mess gets on them. Our plush toy features strong stitching to prevent the seams from easily unraveling, and the filling is made from recycled material, ensuring that it's durable and eco-friendly.

EDUCATIONAL: Give your child a head start by having them learn the names of all wildlife animals! Our recycled Elephant plush toy is an ideal tool for introducing young children to the wonderful world of animals. It's a fun and educational toy that will help your child learn about the importance of recycling and caring for our planet.
DESIGNED IN Warwickshire England – Exclusive Designs by Zappi Co. View Our Other Items in The Zappi Co. Store!
